title: Lake Winnipeg Basin Program: overview - Canada.ca
content:
## Lake Winnipeg Freshwater Ecosystem Initiative
Priorities, partnerships, programs and actions for protecting the waters of Lake Winnipeg through a Freshwater Action Plan.
- Canada Water Agency advances efforts to restore and protect Lake Winnipeg

## Services and information
Goals and priorities, key role of science, agreements, funding.
Active research to improve Lake Winnipeg.

### Funding opportunities
Financial support for projects to improve water quality and ecological health of the Lake Winnipeg Basin.

### Reports and publications
Reports and publications related to the Lake Winnipeg Basin.
Projects funded by the Lake Winnipeg Freshwater Ecosystem Initiative.
Interactive map of the Lake Winnipeg Basin Program's funded projects.

### Give feedback about this page
Thank you for your feedback.
